<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-māu]][[de:Feuer-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de feu]][[hak:Tên-mâu]][[ja:丁卯]][[ko:정묘]][[nds:Füür-Haas]][[vi:Đinh Mão]][[za:Dingmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-báu]][[zh-yue:丁卯]][[zh:丁卯]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-māu]][[de:Feuer-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de feu]][[hak:Tên-mâu]][[ja:丁卯]][[ko:정묘]][[nds:Füür-Haas]][[vi:Đinh Mão]][[za:Dingmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-báu]][[zh-yue:丁卯]][[zh:丁卯]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-māu]][[de:Feuer-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de feu]][[hak:Tên-mâu]][[ja:丁卯]][[ko:정묘]][[nds:Füür-Haas]][[vi:Đinh Mão]][[za:Dingmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-báu]][[zh-yue:丁卯]][[zh:丁卯]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ|qq=}}
{{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくはChōshū Domainの丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as 丁卯''' (hinotou, teika nou, teika nousagi, teibou) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 4th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Fire Tiger]] and followed by [[Yang Earth Dragon]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Hinoto (丁)]] represents yin [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit (卯)]] represents yin [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], forming a generating relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (i.e. Wood gives rise to Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: teibou
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

<!--
==
* Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: ひのとう (hino-tō)
***Onyomi: ていかのうさぎ (teika-no-usagi)
***Onyomi: ていぼう (teibō)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmyo
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

-->
==Years of Yin Fire Rabbit==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 7 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Fire Rabbit]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 7|7 AD]]
* [[AD 67|67 AD]]
* [[AD 127|127 AD]]
* [[187|187 AD]]
* [[247|247 AD]]
* [[307|307 AD]]
* [[367|367 AD]]
* [[427|427 AD]]
* [[487|487 AD]]
* [[547|547 AD]]
* [[607|607 AD]]
* [[667|667 AD]]
* [[AD 727|727 AD]]
* [[AD 787|787 AD]]
* [[847|847 AD]]
* [[907|907 AD]]
* [[967|967 AD]]
|
* [[1027|1027 AD]]
* [[1087|1087 AD]]
* [[1147|1147 AD]]
* [[1207|1207 AD]]
* [[1267|1267 AD]]
* [[1327|1327 AD]]
* [[1387|1387 AD]]
* [[1447|1447 AD]]
* [[1507|1507 AD]]
* [[1567|1567 AD]]
* [[1627|1627 AD]]
* [[1687|1687 AD]]
* [[1747|1747 AD]]
* [[1807|1807 AD]]
* [[1867|1867 AD]]
* [[1927|1927 AD]]
* [[1987|1987 AD]]
|
* [[2047 AD]]
* [[2100s|2107 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2167 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2227 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2287 AD]]
* [[2347 AD]]
* [[25th century|2407 AD]]
* [[2467 AD]]
* [[2527 AD]]
* [[2587 AD]]
* [[2647 AD]]
* [[2707 AD]]
* [[2767 AD]]
* [[2827 AD]]
* [[2887 AD]]
* [[2947 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kinoe (甲)]] or [[Tsuchinoto (己)]]), the month of [[February]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Fire Rabbit]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Rabbit==

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]]
[[zh-yue:丁卯]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|version=98658110|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Haseni]]
[[de:Yin Fire Rabbit]]

[[ja:丁卯]]
[[zh:丁卯]]
[[ko:정묘]]
[[fr:Lièvre de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Hase]]

[[af:Vuurhaas (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Haseni]]
[[en:Fire Rabbit]]
[[fr:Lièvre de feushak]]
[[it:Ding-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Đinh Mão]]
[[za:Dingceij]]
[[ar:Yin Fire Rabbit]]

<!--Yin Fire Rabbit--><!--Yin Fire Rabbit-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurkonyn (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Dĭng-māu]]
[[hak:Tên-mâu]]
[[nds:Füür-Haas]]
[[za:Dingmaux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-báu]]
[[zh-yue:丁卯]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurkonyn (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Dĭng-māu]]
[[hak:Tên-mâu]]
[[nds:Füür-Haas]]
[[za:Dingmaux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-báu]]
[[zh-yue:丁卯]]
{{wikidata link|Q1061999}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
